note:
Treasure kit (synced from synergy entry 198 via the treasure remap). LIVE MODEL, all three slots:
S1 (parser-kept): Full-Burst-enter team buffs — ATK 23.61%, Reload Speed 51.16%, Max Ammo -50.66%, Attack Damage 20.16%, all 10s. The Max Ammo debuff is a fullBurstEnter->allies buff, so it halves magazines during EVERY Full Burst (not only the ones she bursts in), which raises everyone's last-bullet proc rate including her own.
S2: two riders, both on her own lastBullet, both DATAMINED coefficients. (a) 256.17% flatDamage + Damage Taken 10.01%/10s on every last bullet, ungated. (b) 1687% flatDamage gated requiresTargetStatus 'Designated Target' — the kit reads "Activates when the last bullet hits a target in Designated Target status", so it is trigger-driven with NO hardcoded hit count. Both are noRange (skill/rider damage never takes the +30% range major — universal rule) and neither carries noFb: they take the +50% Full Burst major by landing time.
BURST: Superior Elemental Code Attack Damage 130% = elemAdvantageDamagePct (damage-up only with elemental advantage); 1407.64% instantaneous nuke; enemy ATK -5.02%/10s; and targetStatus 'Designated Target' for 10s, which is what gates the S2 rider above.
EVIDENCE — the two rider majors are MEASURED (u7 focus video @ 15.503s, docs/probe-runs.md 2026-07-23; DECISIONS 2026-07-23): one popup stack carries 571,999 (red CORE HIT), 367,714 (white normal), 37,871,391 and 5,750,750, where 37,871,391 / 5,750,750 x 256.17 = 1687.00 identifies the rider independently of the visual read. Both land on the SAME frame sharing one buff snapshot, inside a Full Burst (the 256.17 reads 1.5015x its non-FB value) with the 1687 at 6.58547x it against a kit ratio of 6.58547 (so it takes the +50%). The sim reproduces this from first principles: both riders emit on one frame at major 1.575 = 1 + 0.5 FB + crit, with no +0.3 range term.
STATUS WINDOW: durationSec 10 is DATAMINED, not inferred — the burst line "Designated Target: ATK 5.02% down for 10 sec" IS the status line, so the 10s is the status's own window. Its ATK-down content is inert in v1 (the boss never attacks, and the engine drops non-damageTaken enemy buffs outright), so it is recorded in unmodeled.burst rather than carried as a dead effect.
BOARD: she reads HOT after this encoding landed (T4 1.216 / T4b 1.175 / N5 0.961, mean 1.117). That residual is NOT this encoding — it is the over-model the removed noFb calibration had been hiding (that knob had pulled her 1.29 -> 0.97). DO NOT close it by re-adding noFb or shaving 1687 / 256.17 / 1407.64 (all datamined); it needs per-unit localization. Proc rate measured 38.8% of last bullets in T4 (19 of 49) and 36.6% in N5 (15 of 41), against ~38.6% predicted from ~34% of fight-time in status x ~1.25 in-window last-bullet density — i.e. the trigger is not over-firing.
UNMODELED / inert: the burst's 3s boss stun (v1 boss never acts) is in unmodeled.burst. [materialized 2026-07-16: skill1/burst auto-filled from the offline parser (blablalink prose) — behavior-identical to the prior runtime parse; NOT hand-verified]

burst: Designated Target: ATK ▼ 5.02% for 10 sec. (the STATUS is modeled via targetStatus; its ATK-down content is inert in v1 — the boss never attacks)
